LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS AMERI OIL COMPANY, INC. AND AZAD AMIRI'S MOTION FOR ENFORCEMENT OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. RULING: THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING TAKING THE MATTER OFF CALENDAR. IN LIGHT OF THE ORDER SHORTENING TIME THAT WAS FILED ON JANUARY 23, 2009, BY DEPARTMENT 302, SETTING THE MATTER ON CALENDAR IN DEPARTMENT 302 FOR FEBRUARY 2, 2009, THE COURT AGREES TO HEAR THE MATTER. THE COURT HEARS ARGUMENT AND RULES AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR ENFORCEMENT OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS DENIED. DENIAL IS BASED ON THE LACK OF PAYMENT OF THE MONEY WITHIN THE TIME PERIOD REQUIRED. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR 5797

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS AMERI OIL COMPANY, INC. AND AZAD AMIRI'S Motion For Enforcement Of Settlement Agreement. Appearances: David M. Sternberg, Esq., of David M. Sternberg & Associates, (925) 946-1400, appearing for Defendant, Ameri Oil Company, Inc., and moving party; Taghi Astanehe, Esq., of Astanehe & Schaefer (415) 771-6174, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party. Ruling: The Court Vacates its tentative ruling taking the matter off calendar. In light of the Order Shortening Time that was filed on January 23, 2009, by Department 302, setting the matter on Calendar in Department 302 for February 2, 2009, the Court agrees to hear the matter. The Court hears argument and rules as follows: Defendant's Motion for enforcement of the settlement agreement Is Denied. Denial is based on the lack of payment of the money within the time period required. (302/CWW/VC) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
